blocks.text: Cricket update: How close is that? - Buttler removes Varma with fingertip stumping. England's Jos Buttler stumps India's Tilak Varma but only just, after managing to hang on to the ball for just enough time to hit the stumps before dropping it, with the wicket delighting the home crowd at Trent Bridge.
